footer.tagline: Empowering farmers with AI-driven insights to improve crop yield, detect diseases early, and optimize farming practices.

home.subtitle: Detect diseases, get expert advice, and optimize your yield with Crop AI. The future of farming is here.
home.heroImageAlt: AI scanning crops in a field
home.featuresSub: Our AI-powered platform provides everything you need to maximize your crop yields
home.testimonialsSub: See how Crop AI is transforming agriculture for farmers around the globe
home.ctaSub: Join thousands of farmers already using Crop AI to increase yields, reduce costs, and farm smarter.

features.title: Disease Detection
features.description: Instantly identify crop diseases from photos with high accuracy and receive targeted treatment plans.

features.title: AI Assistant
features.description: Ask farming questions and get expert advice 24/7 with our AI-powered agricultural assistant.

features.title: Yield Analytics
features.description: Track and analyze your crop performance over time with detailed reports and insights.

features.title: Mobile Access
features.description: Access all features on your smartphone in the field, even with limited connectivity.

features.title: Accurate Results
features.description: Get accurate results with our advanced ML model trained on large crop image datasets.

features.title: AI Analysis
features.description: Our advanced AI algorithms analyze images to detect crop health issues and diseases.

features.title: Early Detection
features.description: Identify potential problems before they become serious, saving time and resources.

testimonials.name: John Smith
testimonials.content: Crop AI detected stripe rust on my wheat before it became visible to the naked eye. Saved me thousands in potential losses.

testimonials.name: Maria Rodriguez
testimonials.content: The AI assistant helped me optimize irrigation during last summer's drought. My yields were up 20% compared to neighboring farms.

testimonials.name: Ahmed Hassan
testimonials.content: I've been farming for 30 years and Crop AI still taught me new techniques. The marketplace connects me directly to buyers for better prices.

detect.title: Crop Disease Detection
detect.subtitle: Upload an image of your crops and our AI will identify diseases and provide treatment recommendations
detect.dropHint: Drag and drop your image here or click to browse
detect.tipBody: For best results, ensure good lighting and focus on the affected area of the plant.
detect.cameraHint: Click below to access your camera
detect.noResultsBody: Upload or capture an image of your crops and click "Analyze Image" to get disease detection results and treatment recommendations.
detect.uploadErrorBody: Please select a valid image file.
detect.analysisErrorBody: Failed to analyze the image. Please try again.
detect.mlUnavailableBody: Start the CropAPI server on port 8000 (e.g. run python app.py in the CropAPI folder) or set ML_API_URL in .env.local if it runs elsewhere.

liveSensor.title: Live Hardware Feed
liveSensor.subtitle: Real-time agricultural monitoring from ESP32
liveSensor.connectError: Unable to connect to the API. Retrying...

chat.title: AI Agricultural Assistant
chat.subtitle: Ask any farming or crop-related questions
chat.greeting: Hello! I'm here to help with your farming questions.
chat.greetingWithCase: I see your recent disease check is loaded below—ask me anything about next steps, timing, or safety for this case.
chat.caseHint: AgriBot will use this detection summary to tailor replies.
chat.sensorIncludeLabel: Include ESP32 live readings in replies
chat.sensorHint: When enabled, each message sends the latest data from GET /sensor (DHT11, soil, air, light), or your last snapshot from the Live sensor page.
chat.sensorNoDataBody: POST data from your ESP32 to /sensor or open the Live sensor page when the bridge is running.
chat.sensorRefreshedBody: Latest values will be sent with your next message.
chat.persistHint: This chat is remembered on this browser until you clear it or use private mode.
chat.voiceBody: Click the microphone icon to ask questions using your voice. Speak clearly and naturally.
chat.errorContact: There was a problem contacting the AI assistant.
chat.errorReach: Failed to reach the AI assistant. Please try again.
chat.uploadErrorBody: Please select a valid image file.
suggestions: What's the best way to prevent tomato blight?
How often should I water my corn during a drought?
What are natural pesticides for aphids?
When is the best time to harvest wheat?
How do I test my soil's pH level?

marketplace.title: Agricultural Marketplace
marketplace.subtitle: Quality products for your farm with AI-powered recommendations
marketplace.noProductsSubtitle: Try adjusting your search or filters

payment.title: Payment
payment.payOnDeliveryMsg: You have selected pay on delivery.

dashboard.title: Farm dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Analytics and insights for your farm
dashboard.cropDistDesc: Percentage of land usage by crop type
dashboard.historyDesc: Record of previous crop scans and detected diseases
dashboard.noResultsHint: Try adjusting your search or filters

farmProfile.title: Farm profile
farmProfile.subtitle: Tell AgriBot about your farm so answers match your crop, region, irrigation, and scale. Stored only in this browser.
farmProfile.savedBody: AgriBot will use this context in new replies.
farmProfile.privacyNote: Data stays on your device (localStorage). Not sent to a CropAI server except as text context with chat requests.

auth.name: Full name
auth.signupWelcome: Your account has been created successfully. Welcome to CropAI!
auth.incorrectCredentials: Incorrect email or password. Please try again.
auth.genericError: An error occurred. Please try again.
